nasb.text: I will also cut off the judge from her midst And slay all her princes with him,” says the Lord.

esv.text: I will cut off the ruler from its midst, and will kill all its princes with him,” says the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必剪除他的掌權者， 也把他所有的領袖一同殺死。’ 這是耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 我要铲除摩押的君王， 杀死那里所有的首领。 这是耶和华说的。”
